creator: yuripv@yuripv.net
text: Given that you didn't provide the code snippet and results, I'll just guess that you seem to be misunderstanding what newlocale(3) is about -- it simply creates the locale object to be used by *_l versions of the functions, i.e. you should have used wctomb_l(3) with the locale object you created, or uselocale(3) to set current thread's locale.  The meaning of NULL and LC_GLOBAL_LOCALE is described in xlocale(3).
